CONTENT.Club career: On 15 July 2021, Þórir signed a four-year contract with an option for fifth year with Serie B club Lecce.On 31 August 2023, he moved on loan to Eintracht Braunschweig in German 2. Bundesliga, with an option to buy.
CONTENT.External links: Þórir Jóhann Helgason at the Football Association of Iceland (in Icelandic)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of 8 April 2024As of match played 19 November 2022As of match played 13 June 2022Scores and results list Iceland's goal tally first, score column indicates score after each Þórir goal.
CONTENT.International career: Þórir made his international debut for Iceland on 29 May 2021 in a friendly match against Mexico in Arlington, Texas.

SUMMARY: Þórir Jóhann Helgason (born 28 September 2000) is an Icelandic professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Italian Serie A club Lecce and the Iceland national team.
